name: Repro
description: Repro — Japanese mobile marketing automation platform with push, in-app messaging, and behavioral analytics.

seo.title: Repro — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: Repro: Repro — Japanese mobile marketing automation platform with push, in-app messaging, and behavioral analytics.

when_to_use: Push notification personalization for Japanese mobile apps
In-app messaging automation for mobile retention
Behavioral analytics + marketing automation in one platform
Onboarding flow optimization via A/B testing for mobile
Re-engagement campaigns triggered by user behavior

pros: Solid mobile messaging (push and in-app) automation
Decent behavioral analytics on mobile users
cons: Less powerful than Braze or CleverTap globally
review.verdict: Credible Japanese mobile marketing suite; outside JP it's hard to pick over Braze, Iterable, or CleverTap.
review.best_for: Japanese mobile apps wanting local-language push, in-app, and mobile behavioral analytics.
review.not_for: Global apps already evaluating Braze, Iterable, or warehouse-native marketing stacks.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
